name: Phase 3 - Reinstall vLLM v3 (Fix Permission Error)
description: Force reinstall vLLM to fix C++ extension module error (fixed process killing)

tasks.name: Stop All vLLM Processes
commands: pgrep -u ubuntu python || echo '[OK] All ubuntu python processes stopped'

tasks.name: Clean GPU Memory
tasks.description: Force kill any remaining GPU processes

tasks.name: Uninstall vLLM
tasks.description: Uninstall existing vLLM package as ubuntu user
commands: sudo -u ubuntu bash -c 'pip uninstall -y vllm || true'

tasks.name: Clean pip Cache
tasks.description: Clean pip cache as ubuntu user

tasks.name: Reinstall vLLM
tasks.description: Force reinstall vLLM 0.16.0 as ubuntu user (this takes 5-10 minutes)
commands: echo '[INFO] Reinstalling vLLM {{VLLM_VERSION}} (this may take 5-10 minutes)...'

tasks.name: Verify vLLM Installation
tasks.description: Verify vLLM can be imported without errors
commands: sudo -u ubuntu bash -c 'python3 -c "import vllm; print(f\"[OK] vLLM version: {vllm.__version__}\")"'
sudo -u ubuntu bash -c 'python3 -c "from vllm import LLM, SamplingParams; print(\"[OK] vLLM imports successful\")"'

tasks.name: Verify Custom NIXL Plugin
commands: echo '[ERROR] Custom plugin not found at {{CUSTOM_PLUGIN}}'

tasks.name: Replace NIXL Plugin
tasks.description: Replace pip NIXL plugin with custom Request/Response plugin

tasks.name: Verify Plugin Replacement
tasks.description: Verify Request/Response code in replaced plugin
commands: strings {{TARGET_PLUGIN}} | grep -q READ_REQUEST && echo '[OK] Plugin contains Request/Response code' || { echo '[ERROR] Plugin verification failed'; exit 1; }
strings {{TARGET_PLUGIN}} | grep -c READ_REQUEST | awk '{print "  READ_REQUEST symbols: "$1}'
